top.name: Primordial Surge
top.rules_text: Imbue ALL tiles in AoE 6 with a random element. Deal 4 damage per unique element adjacent to each enemy.

bottom.name: Cataclysm
bottom.rules_text: Remove imbuement from all tiles in AoE 4. Deal 2 damage per tile cleared. Draw 1 card per 3 tiles cleared.

upgrades.description: Primordial Surge imbues a larger area. Cataclysm deals more damage per tile.

changes.value: Imbue ALL tiles in AoE 6 with a random element. Deal 5 damage per unique adjacent element.
Remove imbuement from AoE 4. Deal 3 damage per tile. Draw 1 per 3 tiles.

upgrades.description: Chaos: Primordial Surge now deals immediate damage as well as the adjacency damage — the surge itself is a weapon.

changes.value: Imbue ALL tiles in AoE 5 with random elements. Deal 6 damage per unique adjacent element.

upgrades.description: Reset: Cataclysm now also sets all attunement counters to 2 after clearing tiles. Scorched earth into fresh start.

changes.value: Remove imbuement from AoE 4. Deal 3 damage per tile. Draw 1 per 2 tiles.

upgrades.description: Elemental Madness: The random imbuing now heavily weights toward your dominant attunement element. Controlled chaos.

changes.value: Imbue ALL tiles in AoE 5 with random elements. Deal 7 damage per unique adjacent element.
Remove imbuement from AoE 5. Deal 4 damage per tile. Draw 1 per 2 tiles.

upgrades.description: Cleansing Fire: Cataclysm now also heals you for 2 HP per tile cleared. Destruction becomes sustain.

changes.value: Remove imbuement from AoE 4. Deal 4 damage per tile. Draw 1 per 2 tiles. Heal 2 per tile.

upgrades.description: Primordial Catastrophe: The two halves fuse — Primordial Surge immediately followed by Cataclysm in the same cast.

changes.value: Imbue ALL tiles in AoE 6 with random elements. Deal 8 damage per unique adjacent element.

upgrades.description: Eternal Cycle: After Cataclysm clears, immediately re-imbue cleared tiles with your dominant attunement element.

changes.value: Remove imbuement from AoE 6. Deal 5 damage per tile. Draw 1 per 2 tiles. Gain 2 mana.
